external_services.office: Lipa City Personnel Office External Services
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Screening of Walk-in Applicants in the City Government of Lipa

checklist_of_requirements.source: Schools/ universities where the applicant graduated

steps.client_step: 1. Submit application letter together with the requirements to the Lipa City Personnel Office
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive application together with the Personal Data Sheet (PDS) and other credentials
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer V (Lipa City Personnel Officer)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit application letter together with the requirements to the Lipa City Personnel Office
steps.agency_action: 1.2. Notify the applicants to report to the office thru text or phone call
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer V (Lipa City Personnel Officer)

steps.agency_action: 2.1. Interview applicants for preliminary assessment of qualification
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer V (Lipa City Personnel Officer)

steps.agency_action: 2.2. Refer applicants to PESO when there is no vacancy
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer V (Lipa City Personnel Officer)

steps.agency_action: 2.3. Inform the applicant of: Schedule of deliberation
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer V (Lipa City Personnel Officer)

steps.agency_action: 2.4. Inform the applicant of: Approved applicant
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer V (Lipa City Personnel Officer)

external_services.office: Lipa City Personnel Office External Services

checklist_of_requirements.source: School where the applicant is currently enrolled

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Training and Liability Waiver duly notarized
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Personnel Office or Schools

steps.client_step: 1. Submit complete requirements to the Lipa City Personnel Office
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive complete requirements and assess student credentials to determine office assignment
steps.person_responsible: Human Resource Management Officer II / Human Resource Management Assistant / Lipa City Personnel Officer (Lipa City Personnel Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit complete requirements to the Lipa City Personnel Office
steps.agency_action: 1.2. Prepare letter endorsing the student to respective department for actual on-the-job training
steps.person_responsible: Human Resource Management Officer II / Human Resource Management Assistant / Lipa City Personnel Officer (Lipa City Personnel Office)

steps.agency_action: 2. Conduct orientation prior to actual training
steps.person_responsible: Assistant City Personnel Officer (Lipa City Personnel Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Submit DTR and Certification from the Department Head for completion of training hours
steps.agency_action: 3. Approve, sign and issue Certificate of Completion
steps.person_responsible: Human Resource Management Officer II / Human Resource Management Assistant / City Personnel Officer (Lipa City Personnel Office)

external_services.office: Lipa City Personnel Office External Services
external_services.service_name: GSIS Kiosk Assistance for Pensioners and Active Members
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens / G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: All GSIS pensioners and active members

steps.client_step: 1. Proceed to the Lipa City Personnel Office to request for assistance
steps.agency_action: 1. Assist pensioners/ active members in their GSIS kiosk transactions
steps.person_responsible: Human Resource Management Officer III / Human Resource Management Officer II / Human Resource Management Officer I (Lipa City Personnel Office)

external_services.office: Lipa City Personnel Office External Services
external_services.service_name: Submission of SALN of Barangay Officials

steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive and review the submitted accomplished SALN form
steps.person_responsible: Human Resource Management Officer III / Administrative Assistant IV (Lipa City Personnel Office)

steps.agency_action: 1.2. Prepare transmittal letter to the Office of the Ombudsman
steps.person_responsible: Human Resource Management Officer III (Lipa City Personnel Office)
City Personnel Officer (Lipa City Personnel Office)

steps.agency_action: 1.4. Submit to the Office of the Ombudsman
steps.person_responsible: Human Resource Management Officer III / Administrative Assistant IV (Lipa City Personnel Office)
